g.title: serial.routing_list_user:stream->serial.stream:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (stream) REFERENCES serial.stream(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.routing_list_user:reader->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (reader) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
